notes: THE WARREN · one errand per unreached fey. Availability: party holds a fey of giver_court. Requirement: party fields a fey satisfying `needs` (damage_type == this fey's weakness, else a fey of another court). The engine composes each card from the target's feys.json name/manifestation/request + the `hook` line here. Completing an errand recruits the target.

errands.needs_line: bring someone flame-touched · they know the courtesies you don't
errands.hook: One of yours mentions a cousin out past the string-lights who never comes in where it's bright.

errands.needs_line: bring someone iron-touched · they know the courtesies you don't
errands.hook: A seelie in your party leaves a saucer of something sweet at the fence and tells you who it's for.

errands.needs_line: bring someone salt-touched · they know the courtesies you don't
errands.hook: Word comes gently, the seelie way: someone kind is waiting to be asked, and only asked.

errands.needs_line: bring someone flame-touched · they know the courtesies you don't
errands.hook: Your seelie draws you a small map on a napkin. The X is past where the Faire admits to ending.

errands.needs_line: bring someone iron-touched · they know the courtesies you don't
errands.hook: An unseelie in your party owes a debt out in the dark and would rather you paid the visit.

errands.hook: The word arrives the unseelie way: not an invitation, a location, and a warning attached.

errands.needs_line: bring someone iron-touched · they know the courtesies you don't
errands.hook: One of yours points with its chin at a part of the grounds that isn't on any map and is real.

errands.needs_line: bring someone iron-touched · they know the courtesies you don't
errands.hook: A wildfey in your party knows a way under the fence and will show you the mouth of it, not the end.

errands.needs_line: bring someone iron-touched · they know the courtesies you don't
errands.hook: The wild one tells you sideways: something out there has been waiting the way weather waits.

errands.hook: Your wildfey grins and names it, which for a wildfey is nearly an introduction.
